name: Rain on Glass
description: The scene behind the window fogged by a blur, with rain droplets running down the pane. Each droplet refracts the scene and leaves a trail of beads that fade as it falls. Droplet size, rain amount, fall speed and refraction strength are this pack's own parameters. It shows through wherever the window itself is translucent, so pair it with an opacity rule.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Fog radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene fogs behind the glass (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the pane (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Droplet size
parameters.description: Overall size of the droplets, larger values mean bigger drops

parameters.name: Rain amount
parameters.description: How much of the pane carries droplets

parameters.name: Fall speed
parameters.description: How quickly the droplets run down the pane

parameters.name: Refraction
parameters.description: How strongly droplets bend the scene behind them (px)
